data.title: Michael Saylor: Has discussed Bitcoin with the President of El Salvador
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Michael Saylor posted on the X platform that he had a wonderful discussion with Salvadoran President Nayib Bukele on the opportunities for El Salvador to benefit from global Bitcoin applications and accelerate its development.

data.title: Tether Announces Strategic Acquisition of Minority Stake in Juventus Football Club
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to official news, Tether announced the strategic acquisition of a minority stake in Juventus Football Club, one of the most successful and iconic football clubs in the world. This investment aims to promote Tether's integration of its future investment portfolio into the sports industry. This acquisition is also an important milestone in Tether's goal of integrating stablecoins, digital assets and people-oriented technologies into daily life, and is also the basis for Tether's previous initiatives in cooperation with professional sports clubs.

data.title: FTX expects to begin paying customers who did not meet the first round of asset allocation requirements in Q2
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Sunil, the representative of FTX creditors, published a post on the X platform, revealing that FTX has sent email notifications to customers who have not met the requirements for the first round of asset distribution. Customers who failed to participate in the first round of distribution on February 18, 2025 include: customers whose claims are under review, customers whose claims exceed US$50,000, and customers who have not completed KYC, tax and distributor requirements. After completing the relevant requirements, these customers will be included in the subsequent distribution plan, which is expected to be carried out in the second quarter of 2025.

data.title: Bitcoin spot ETF had a total net outflow of $157 million yesterday, continuing its net outflow for 4 consecutive days. HODL conducted a 4-for-1 stock split after the market closed yesterday.
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to SoSoValue data, yesterday (February 13, Eastern Time), the total net outflow of Bitcoin spot ETFs was US$157 million. Yesterday, Grayscale ETF GBTC had a single-day net outflow of US$6.8611 million, and the current historical net outflow of GBTC is US$21.966 billion. Grayscale Bitcoin Mini Trust ETF BTC had a single-day net outflow of US$0.00, and the current historical total net inflow of Grayscale Bitcoin Mini Trust BTC is US$1.253 billion. The Bitcoin spot ETF with the largest single-day net inflow yesterday was BlackRock ETF IBIT, with a single-day net inflow of US$26.2143 million, and the current historical total net inflow of IBIT reached US$40.878 billion. As of press time, the total net asset value of the Bitcoin spot ETF is US$112.49 billion, the ETF net asset ratio (market value to the total market value of Bitcoin) is 5.89%, and the historical cumulative net inflow has reached US$40.05 billion. 
Special note: VanEck Bitcoin ETF (HODL) conducted a 1-for-4 stock split after the market closed on February 13, and will be traded at the new stock price after the opening of the market on February 14.

data.title: A certain address has withdrawn 123,000 SOL from CEX in the last 21 hours
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to monitoring by on-chain analyst Yu Jin, an address has withdrawn a total of 123,000 $SOL (US$24.04 million) from Bitget in the past 21 hours, with an average price of US$195, and then deposited all of them into Solayer in exchange for SSOL.

data.title: Today, the US Bitcoin ETF has a net outflow of 1,765 BTC, and the Ethereum ETF has a net outflow of 5,514 ETH
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to Lookonchain statistics, 10 Bitcoin ETFs had a net outflow of 1,765 BTC (about $171 million) today, of which Fidelity had an outflow of 982 BTC (about $95.21 million), and currently holds 207,542 BTC (about $20.1 billion).
In addition, 9 Ethereum ETFs had a net outflow of 5,514 ETH (about $14.89 million) today, of which Grayscale (ETHE) had an outflow of 11,375 ETH (about $30.71 million), and currently holds 1,304,767 ETH (about $3.52 billion).

data.title: Tether CEO Describes USDT As Key Ally To Dollar Dominance
data.description: According to Odaily, Tether CEO Paolo Ardoino stated on the X platform that USDT serves as the best ally to the dominance of the U.S. dollar.

data.title: An ancient whale sold 6,672 ETH again after seven months
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to ai_9684xtpa monitoring, the "Ancient Whale of Ethereum ICO 100,000 $ETH" sold 6,672 ETH again after seven months, worth $18.08 million. The whale transferred 11,672 ETH to the new address 0xe92...f1c0e four hours ago, and then recharged 6,672 ETH into Kraken, with its ETH cost as low as $0.31. The wallet currently still holds 5,000 ETH, which may be sold in the near future.

data.title: A whale transferred about 500,000 $OM to Binance, worth about $2.73 million
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News On-chain data shows that a whale transferred 500,090.59 $OM to Binance, worth about $2,735,495.53.
It is reported that the whale received about 3.5 million $OM tokens in the past three months, worth about $14 million.

data.title: Security Concerns Arise Over U.S. Government Efficiency Department's Website
data.description: According to Odaily, the website of the U.S. Government Efficiency Department, led by Elon Musk, is reportedly facing security issues. The site, which primarily tracks federal government spending cuts, appears to be sourcing data from a database that can be edited by anyone. This raises concerns about the accuracy and reliability of the information provided on the platform.
